mapper.select: SELECT * FROM likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO likes (user_id, post_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{postId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes WHERE post_id = #{postId}
